text: Welcome to the community, @helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Thanks for stepping up to help keep our space safe and welcoming. Check out the mod guidelines and introduce yourself!
Hey @newbie_kim, welcome to the community! So glad you're here. Take a look around, introduce yourself, and don't hesitate to ask questions. We're happy to help you get settled in!
Welcome, @mentor_lina! Thank you for volunteering as a mentor. Your experience will be invaluable in helping new members grow. Excited to have you on the team!
Welcome aboard, @guide_sam! You're now an event helper. Looking forward to your contributions in organizing awesome community events. Feel free to reach out if you need anything!
